name: Major Liquidations - Buy, Sell, Trade Gold & Electronics
description_short: Pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling of gold, jewelry, and electronics. Limited accessible information available.
description_long: Major Liquidations LLC operates as a pawn shop focused on gold, jewelry, and electronics transactions. Based on the company name and stated services (Buy, Sell, Trade Gold & Electronics), they appear to offer typical pawn shop services including collateral-based short-term loans using personal items as security, as well as retail buying and selling of used precious metals and electronics. The pawn shop model provides quick access to cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes, making it accessible to consumers who may not qualify for traditional lending. However, the lack of detailed website content, published rates, terms, or contact information makes it difficult to assess specific loan terms, interest rates, or fee structures that would typically be transparent for consumer finance companies.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Accepts multiple collateral types (gold, jewelry, electronics) for loans
Buy/sell/trade model offers flexibility for consumers looking to liquidate or acquire items
No credit check required for collateral-based loans
Likely offers same-day or quick funding typical of pawn operations
Serves consumers excluded from traditional lending due to poor credit
cons: Website provides minimal operational information—no rates, terms, or hours visible
No published interest rates or fee schedules available for comparison
Instagram-only web presence limits accessibility and professional credibility
No transparent loan terms, repayment periods, or redemption policies disclosed
Risk of losing collateral if loan cannot be repaid—items are forfeited to pawn shop
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash and willing to use personal items as collateral
Individuals with poor or no credit history seeking short-term loans
People looking to sell or trade gold, jewelry, or used electronics quickly
diagnosis: Major Liquidations is best for consumers in immediate need of cash who have valuable items to pledge as collateral and cannot access traditional lending. Primary caveat: the company's minimal web presence and lack of transparent terms, rates, and policies make it impossible to assess loan costs or compare offers—consumers should request detailed rate and fee information in-person before using their services.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
